title: Portfolio automation subscribe
excerpt:
Hi! 
We have a portfolio with 200 projects, each assigned to one or more people. 
Is it possible to create an automation to subscribe to the project board for the person assigned to the portfolio? 
Thanks!

posts.author: Molina (Irene)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

We have a portfolio with 200 projects, each assigned to one or more people.

Is it possible to create an automation to subscribe to the project board for the person assigned to the portfolio?

Thanks!
